questions.question: When Lloyd Christmas said, "Harry, I took care of it!", to what was he referring?
questions.answer: He taped Petey the bird's head back on

questions.question: If Xzibit took a car to West Coast Customs, what was about to happen to it?
questions.answer: It was about to get "pimped out"

questions.question: With a self-titled debut album in 1982, what envelope-pushing artist was named Artist of the Decade by MTV and Billboard Magazine?
How many consecutive Super Bowl games did the Buffalo Bills lose in the 1990s?
What might something be called if it is emotionally valuable, much like The Ring in The Lord of the Rings?
